metadata.name: Artemis V current Gateway NRHO proxy (full sample decimated)
metadata.source: NASA public sample NRHO trajectory page (Lee 2019) reused here because current public Artemis V materials stage the mission through Gateway in the same southern 9:2 NRHO family used across Artemis/Gateway studies.
metadata.use_case: Draw the overall southern 9:2 Gateway NRHO family/shape for the current official Artemis V view.
